title: mistyllus mutabilis
intro: Mistyllus mutabilis, also known as the Chinese parasol tree or varnish tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Meliaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and fever, as well as its antiseptic and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Mistyllus mutabilis include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant effects, although more research is needed to confirm these benefits. Herbal preparations of Mistyllus mutabilis include extracts and infusions that can be used to treat various ailments, although proper dosing and preparation should be done under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
